# Premium Yoga Studio

> Premium light website for a yoga instructor or yoga studio, focused on mindful movement, private sessions, group classes, breathing, relaxation and a calm wellness experience.

This website presents a modern yoga studio with a soft visual identity, clear service pages, class schedule information, gallery, contact details and legal pages. It is a static HTML website prepared for fast hosting on GitHub Pages or Cloudflare Pages.

## Main pages

- [Home](https://www.vasa-domena.hr/): Overview of the yoga studio, positioning, main benefits, programs and calls to action.
- [About](https://www.vasa-domena.hr/o-nama.html): Introduction to the yoga instructor, teaching approach, values and studio atmosphere.
- [Programs](https://www.vasa-domena.hr/programi.html): Yoga program overview, including Hatha yoga, Vinyasa flow, Yin & Relax and private sessions.
- [Schedule](https://www.vasa-domena.hr/raspored.html): Weekly yoga class schedule and guidance for choosing a class.
- [Gallery](https://www.vasa-domena.hr/galerija.html): Visual overview of the studio, yoga practice and wellness atmosphere.
- [Contact](https://www.vasa-domena.hr/kontakt.html): Contact form, phone, email, address placeholder and reservation call to action.

## Legal and technical pages

- [Privacy Policy](https://www.vasa-domena.hr/politika-privatnosti.html): Privacy information for website visitors and contact form users.
- [Cookie Policy](https://www.vasa-domena.hr/politika-kolacica.html): Cookie information and consent details.
- [Sitemap](https://www.vasa-domena.hr/sitemap.xml): XML sitemap with the main public pages.
- [Robots](https://www.vasa-domena.hr/robots.txt): Crawling instructions for web robots.

## Website facts

- Language: Croatian
- Type: Static HTML website
- Topic: Yoga studio, yoga instructor, mindful movement, wellness, relaxation
- Hosting target: GitHub Pages or Cloudflare Pages
- Image format: AVIF
- Primary audience: People looking for yoga classes, private yoga sessions and a calm wellness practice

## Optional context

- [Full LLM context](https://www.vasa-domena.hr/llms-full.txt): Extended plain-text summary of the website content for AI agents.
